entity.summary: Decentralized derivatives exchange protocol whose first perpetual market launched on Ethereum on 2020-04-20. The protocol later migrated from the StarkEx-based v3 deployment to the independent Cosmos-SDK-based dYdX Chain, whose mainnet launched on 2023-10-26.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record. HEI uses the first perpetual-market launch as the exchange start marker and treats v3 and dYdX Chain as lifecycle deployments of one protocol identity.

events.title: dYdX launched its first decentralized perpetual market
events.description: dYdX launched a BTC-USDC perpetual contract market on Ethereum on 2020-04-20, marking the protocol's first production decentralized perpetual exchange product.
events.notes: Earlier lending and margin products existed, but HEI uses the perpetual-market launch as the clean exchange start marker.

events.title: dYdX Chain mainnet launched and protocol migration began
events.description: The community-launched dYdX Chain mainnet went live on 2023-10-26. Markets initially operated in post-only mode, and the community later enabled full-production trading as the ecosystem migrated from dYdX v3 to the new chain.
events.notes: The transition included both protocol deployment migration and DYDX token migration to the new L1 chain.

evidence.title: dYdX Launches BTC Perpetual Contract Market
evidence.notes: Primary announcement for the first decentralized perpetual market.

evidence.title: dYdX - 2020 Review
evidence.notes: Primary retrospective confirming the April 2020 perpetual protocol launch.

evidence.title: New Trading Pairs Considerations
evidence.notes: Foundation source establishing the 2023-10-26 mainnet launch and later full-production trading milestones.

evidence.title: Expanded Utility of DYDX on the dYdX Chain
evidence.notes: Primary source describing chain genesis and migration of DYDX utility to the L1 chain.
